entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.
entries.value: Capable ẹ̀kọ́ alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí kì í ṣe depend lórí jiọ́gíràfì, owó-wiwọlé ẹbí, tàbí whether akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ already knows right person láti béèrè.

entries.source: A crawlable directory of every guest learning chat entrypoint.
entries.value: Àkójọ tí ẹ̀rọ ìwádìí lè kà ti gbogbo guest ẹ̀kọ́ chat ẹnu-ọ̀nà.

entries.source: A free-to-access AI tutor layer that can fit your institution.
entries.value: Free-to-access AI olùkọ́ ìpele yẹn lè bá mu tirẹ institution.

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.
entries.value: Akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ base yẹn already extends beyond India sí gbooro síi international olùgbọ́.

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè ṣí kọ́ Anything, Socratic Instruction, olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ ilé, ìṣirò Step olùkọ́, àwọn quiz, tàbí àwọn kaadi ìrántí directly nínú ipo àlejò láti àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́ gbangba àkójọ.

entries.source: A learning community begins
entries.value: Ẹ̀kọ́ àwùjọ begins

entries.source: A school-specific learning experience can be shaped around your student community, tone, and learning priorities.
entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́-pato ẹ̀kọ́ experience lè be shaped yí ká tirẹ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àwùjọ, tone, àti ẹ̀kọ́ priorities.

entries.source: About inspir
entries.value: Nípa inspir

entries.source: Access can be funded by partner schools or supported through CSR sponsorship paths for communities that need subsidised AI learning.
entries.value: Ìráyè wọlé lè be funded nípasẹ̀ àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ alábàáṣmoṣẹ́ tàbí supported nípasẹ̀ ìgbọ́wọ́ CSR àwọn ọ̀nà fún àwọn àwùjọ yẹn nílò subsidised AI ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: Access first
entries.value: Ìráyè wọlé kọ́kọ́

entries.source: Adapt the student experience around school context, curriculum priorities, content guardrails, and the level of staff visibility needed.
entries.value: Mú bá mu akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ experience yí ká school àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀, curriculum priorities, àkóónú guardrails, àti ìpele ti staff visibility nílò.

entries.source: After the inspir.app domain was sold to fund continued free access, the live product moved to inspirlearning.com.
entries.value: Lẹ́yìn inspir.app domain was sold láti fund continued ọ̀fẹ́ ìráyè wọlé, taara ọja moved láti inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Different àwọn iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ nílò different interaction àwọn fọ́ọ̀mù, so inspir uses active, mode-specific kíkọ́ni. iṣẹ́ ilé ìtọ́ni, Socratic ìbéèrè, historical simulation, kaadi ìrántí àtúnyẹ̀wò, àti kíkọ àtúpalẹ̀ yẹ kí kì í ṣe behave like kan náà gbogbogbò chat.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Míì àwọn moṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ nílò míì àwọn fọ́ọ̀mù: àwọn ìbéèrè Socratic, iṣẹ́ ilé àwọn ìtọ́ni, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àríyànjiyàn, ìtàn ere ipa, kíkọ àtúpalẹ̀, àti ètò ẹ̀kọ́ning.

entries.value: Kò gba laaye

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Evaluate gbangba AI ẹ̀kọ́ ìpele àkọ́kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà ṣàwárí custom àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ nílò, àkóónú alignment, àti usage funding.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Gbogbo core ẹ̀kọ́ ipo ní gbangba guest ẹnu-ọ̀nà so ènìyàn lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ láti wá, social, tàbí tí a pín ìjápọ̀.

entries.value: Báwo ni did inspir bẹ̀rẹ̀?

entries.value: Báwo ni Ṣe inspir reduce answer-copying?

entries.value: Báwo ni inspir ṣe yàtọ̀ sí AI chatbot gbogbogbò?

entries.source: How is this different from giving students a generic AI chatbot?
entries.value: Báwo ni Jẹ́ yìí different láti fífún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ gbogbogbò AI chatbot?

entries.source: How public guest learning can extend into school-specific AI learning spaces.
entries.value: Báwo gbangba guest ẹ̀kọ́ lè extend sí ilé-ẹ̀kọ́-pato AI ẹ̀kọ́ spaces.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Dámọ̀ ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn àfojúsùn yẹn matter most: conceptual ìrànlọ́wọ́, iṣẹ́ ilé àwọn ìtọ́ni, ìmúrasílẹ̀ ìdánwò, ìrántí aláṣmoṣẹ́, ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ, tàbí enrichment.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir began nínú 2013 gẹ́gẹ́ bí gbangba quiz àti ẹ̀kọ́ àwùjọ, grew nípasẹ̀ àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ networks, àti later developed AI ẹ̀kọ́ infrastructure àti gbangba ìkọ́ni AI àwọn ìrírí.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: Inspir exists láti ṣe ẹ̀kọ́ rọrùn láti dé, fanimọ́ra, dún mọ́ni, àti wúlò fún anyone pẹ̀lú ìfẹ́ ìwádìí nípasẹ̀ ọ̀fẹ́ gbangba àwọn irinṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ AI àti school-ready ẹ̀kọ́ spaces.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: Inspir jẹ́ ọ̀fẹ́ AI pẹpẹ ẹ̀kọ́ pẹ̀lú àwọn ipo àlejò gbangba fún àwọn àlàyé, Socratic ìkọ́ni, olùkọ́ iṣẹ́ iléing, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àríyànjiyàn, ere ipa, ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ, àti ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣètò.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Inspir jẹ́ ọ̀fẹ́ AI pẹpẹ ẹ̀kọ́ pẹ̀lú àwọn ipo àlejò gbangba fún àwọn àlàyé, Socratic ìkọ́ni, olùkọ́ iṣẹ́ iléing, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àríyànjiyàn, ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ, kíkóòdù ìrànlọ́wọ́, àti ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣètò.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: Inspir jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ yí ká ìrònú, adaṣe, recall, àti àlàyé dípò ti handing àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ parí iṣẹ́.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: Inspir jẹ́ ṣètò yí ká àwọn ìtọ́ni, àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àríyànjiyàn, àtúnyẹ̀wò, àti àlàyé dípò ti passive answer-copying.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: Inspir jẹ́ ṣètò yí ká ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ipo such gẹ́gẹ́ bí Socratic ìkọ́ni, àwọn ìtọ́ni iṣẹ́ ilé, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, maths àwọn ìgbésẹ̀, kíkọ àtúpalẹ̀, àti ìdánwò ìṣètò, so àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ land nínú síi dojú kọ ẹ̀kọ́ ìhùwàsí.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes public and indexable at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir ń mú àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́ gbangba àti indexable ní /chat/{topicSlug}, letting àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ land directly inside right AI ẹ̀kọ́ experience láìsí needing saved ìkọ̀kọ̀ chat.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir ṣètò AI yí ká active ẹ̀kọ́ behaviors: àwọn ìtọ́ni, àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àtúpalẹ̀, àti àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: Inspir ṣètò AI yí ká ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ipo pẹ̀lú pato kíkọ́ni ìhùwàsí: àwọn àlàyé, Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìtọ́ni iṣẹ́ ilé, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àríyànjiyàn, ere ipa, ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ, àti ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣètò.

entries.source: inspir school AI learning use cases
entries.value: inspir ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ AI ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ọ̀nà lílo

entries.source: inspir school deployment features
entries.value: inspir ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀ àwọn ẹya

entries.source: inspir school deployment path
entries.value: inspir ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀ ọ̀nà

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir started gẹ́gẹ́ bí Facebook ojú-ìwé publishing àwọn quiz àti building ìṣe àṣà ti extracurricular ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: inspir went taara gẹ́gẹ́ bí consumer-facing AI ẹ̀kọ́ ọja within àwọn ọ̀sẹ̀ ti ChatGPT's gbangba release.

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: Inspir ṣiṣẹ́ pẹ̀lú schools láti pèsè tó bá a mu AI chat àwọn ìrírí fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́, tí a kọ́ yí ká ìkọ̀kọ̀, curriculum nílò, àti wúlò òótọ́ ayé ti school ìdásílẹ̀.

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: ìkọ́lé iran tó kàn ti inspir.uk

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: inspir’s go-to-market grew láti existing offline network ti àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti universities yẹn had already engaged pẹ̀lú extracurricular programmes àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ events. yẹn network ràn lọ́wọ́ inspir dé ọ̀dọ̀ síi than ọ̀kan million àwọn onílo across ọ̀fẹ́ pẹpẹ àti àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ alábàáṣmoṣẹ́.

entries.source: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, and anyone writing about inspir can use it for facts, links, story angles, and citation-friendly references.
entries.value: Journalists, àkójọ editors, partners, àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́, AI àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìdáhùn, àti anyone kíkọ nípa inspir lè lo ó fún facts, àwọn ìjápọ̀, ìtàn-àròsọ angles, àti citation-friendly references.

entries.value: Jury's Choice recognition láti Amod Malviya ní DeepHack fún AI ẹ̀kọ́ iṣẹ́.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: Product angle
entries.value: Ọja angle

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Gbangba àlàyé ti ipo àlejò, ìkọ̀kọ̀ chats, crawler ìlànà, akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ààbò, àti school trust.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò fún anyone tó wúlò ibi láti bẹ̀rẹ̀, nígbà tí ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti alábàáṣiṣẹ́ deployments lè adapt experience fún local nílò.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Gbangba guest-mode URLs exist so àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè land tààrà nínú wúlò ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ipo láti wá, social àwọn ìjápọ̀, schools, àti AI ìdáhùn engines.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ojú-ìwé jẹ́ ṣí láti wá àti AI ìrántí crawlers, nígbà tí admin àwọn irinṣẹ́, API àwọn ọ̀nà, reset flows, àti ìkọ̀kọ̀ utilities jẹ́ disallowed.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ojú-ìwé, kókó chats, àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́, blog àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti aláṣẹ àwọn ojú-ìwé jẹ́ intended láti jẹ́ rọrùn láti ṣàwárí.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Reached across ọ̀fẹ́ gbangba pẹpẹ àti alábàáṣiṣẹ́ ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ deployments.

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Reference àwọn ìjápọ̀, gbangba facts, press àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀, àti citation-friendly details.

entries.source: Robots policy
entries.value: Robots ìlànà

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots àwọn òfin jẹ́ kí Google, ìlànà wá crawlers, àti major AI discovery crawlers lórí gbangba àwọn ojú-ìwé, nígbà tí blocking API àwọn ọ̀nà, admin àwọn ọ̀nà, àti reset flows.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Saved onílo conversations lo ìkọ̀kọ̀ identifiers, jẹ́ kì í ṣe wà nínú nínú sitemap tàbí AI discovery àwọn fáìlì, àti yẹ kí kì í ṣe jẹ́ treated gẹ́gẹ́ bí gbangba source ohun èlò.

entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti CSR pathways fún funded ìráyè wọlé

entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ angle

entries.source: School deployment pathway
entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀ ọ̀nà

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ deployments lè be adapted yí ká custom content, àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, àwọn ìbéèrè, àti NCERT-aligned ẹ̀kọ́ nílò ibo appropriate.

entries.source: School leaders
entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ leaders

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: School rollouts lè jẹ́ planned yí ká akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ privacy, staff oversight, àti wúlò àwọn ààlà àwùjọ ẹ̀kọ́ nílò.

entries.source: Schools
entries.value: Awọn ile-iwe

entries.source: Schools and CSR partners
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti CSR partners

entries.source: Schools and partners
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti partners

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti partners lè kọ́ láti gbangba ọja toward tó bá a mu, confidential, àti subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè evaluate inspir nípasẹ̀ gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò àkọ́kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà ṣàwárí tó bá a mu AI ẹ̀kọ́ spaces pẹ̀lú custom àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, curriculum nílò, àti funded ìráyè wọlé àwọn ọ̀nà.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè evaluate gbangba àwọn ipo àkọ́kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà discuss tó bá a mu àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, content nílò, àti funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ nípasẹ̀ trying gbangba àwọn ipo, lẹ́yìn náà lọ toward tó bá a mu ẹ̀dà nígbà tí wọ́n nílò custom àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, content alignment, tàbí funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè dánwò gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò àkọ́kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà lo àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ojú-ìwé láti ṣàwárí tó bá a mu àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, NCERT-aligned options, àti funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Search visibility has boundaries
entries.value: Wá visibility ní àwọn ààlà

entries.source: Short description
entries.value: Short àpèjúwe

entries.source: Simple paths from public guest mode to school deployment.
entries.value: Rọrùn àwọn ọ̀nà láti gbangba ipo àlejò láti ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀.

entries.source: Start directly in the right learning mode for homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards, or exam planning.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ directly nínú right ipo ẹ̀kọ́ fún iṣẹ́ ilé àwọn ìtọ́ni, maths àwọn ìgbésẹ̀, kíkọ àtúpalẹ̀, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, tàbí ètò ìdánwòning.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú gbangba ipo àlejò, lẹ́yìn náà shape ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ẹ̀dà yí ká gidi nílò.

entries.source: Student AI chat
entries.value: Akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ AI chat

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Awọn ọmọ ile-iwe

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò tààrà ìrànlọ́wọ́, àwọn olùkọ́ nílò tó dojú kọ ẹ̀kọ́ ìhùwàsí, leaders nílò ní ojúṣe ìdásílẹ̀ àwọn ọ̀nà, àti partners nílò tó mọ́ ways láti fund ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Study workflows that connect guest modes, prompts, practice, and related guides.
entries.value: Àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ yẹn so pọ̀ àwọn ipo àlejò, àwọn ìbéèrè, adaṣe, àti jọmọ́ àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà.

entries.source: Support funded AI learning access for communities that need high-quality support without adding cost to families.
entries.value: Ìtìlẹ́yìn funded AI ẹ̀kọ́ access fún àwọn àwùjọ yẹn nílò high-didára ìtìlẹ́yìn láìsí adding cost láti àwọn ẹbí.

entries.source: Syndicated coverage for wider consumer reach.
entries.value: Syndicated coverage fún gbooro síi consumer dé ọ̀dọ̀.

entries.source: Tailored AI learning experiences for school communities, curriculum needs, confidentiality planning, and funded access.
entries.value: Tailored AI ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìrírí fún ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn àwùjọ, curriculum nílò, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, àti funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Teachers
entries.value: Àwọn olùkọ́

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Àwọn olùkọ́ àti leaders lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú kọ́ Anything, Socratic Instruction, olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ ilé, àwọn quiz, àti àwọn kaadi ìrántí kí formal rollout.

entries.source: Terms
entries.value: Awọn ofin

entries.source: Text-first discovery file for AI answer engines, assistants, educators, and citation tools.
entries.value: Text-first discovery fáìlì fún AI ìdáhùn engines, assistants, àwọn olùkọ́ni, àti citation àwọn irinṣẹ́.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: App jẹ́ ṣètò yí ká kíkọ́ni àwọn ìhùwàsí such gẹ́gẹ́ bí Socratic questioning, àwọn ìtọ́ni iṣẹ́ ilé, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, ere ipa, àti ìṣètò.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Community expanded nípasẹ̀ àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àwọn àwùjọ.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: Formal privacy ojú-ìwé fún data lo, àwọn ẹ̀tọ́, àti gbangba iṣẹ́ àwọn ìpinnu.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Formal àwọn òfin covering acceptable lo, àkọọlẹ̀ responsibilities, àti iṣẹ́ àwọn ìpinnu.

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: Àfojúsùn jẹ́ discovery àti citation ti gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ojú-ìwé. gbangba àwọn ọ̀nà, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ibùdó jẹ́ ṣí láti major AI wá, ìrántí, àti olùrànlọ́wọ́ crawlers, nígbà tí API, admin, reset, àti ìkọ̀kọ̀ utility àwọn ọ̀nà stay disallowed.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: Taara robots àwọn òfin lò nípasẹ̀ wá crawlers àti AI ìrántí àwọn eto.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: Taara, crawlable ẹ̀kọ́ fi hàn yẹn ń yí iṣẹ́ àfojúsùn sí ọja ìhùwàsí.

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: Tó kàn phase jẹ́ open-source, contributor-friendly, àti sopọ̀ láti gbooro síi international buildout ní inspir.uk.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Open-source rebuild fún developers, àwọn olùkọ́ni, àti contributors.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Pẹpẹ worked lórí curriculum gbígbé wọlé, ìrántí, tí a ṣètò ẹ̀kọ́ flows, àti early AI ìkọ́ni àwọn ìrírí.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: Gbangba àkọsílẹ̀ contains síi than 100 àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, ìbéèrè àwọn ìyípo, àti pillar clusters connected láti taara àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: Gbangba àlàyé ti kí nìdí inspir exists àti kí nìdí ẹ̀kọ́ access ṣe pàtàkì.

entries.source: The public inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments can be customised around each school’s content, workflows, and student context.
entries.value: Gbangba inspir pẹpẹ ń ràn lọ́wọ́ àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ practise extracurricular activities àti ṣàwárí àwọn èrò. ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ deployments lè be customised yí ká kọọkan ilé-ẹ̀kọ́’s content, àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ipo jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ yí ká ẹ̀kọ́ ìhùwàsí: àwọn ìtọ́ni, Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, ìgbésẹ̀ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ, àtúnyẹ̀wò àwọn ìyípo, àti active àlàyé.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: Gbangba ọja jẹ́ easy láti gbìyànjú àkọ́kọ́, nígbà tí schools àti partners lè ṣàwárí tó bá a mu deployments fún àwùjọ nílò.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Gbangba ọja ń pa ẹ̀kọ́ easy láti gbìmọ̀ wò, nígbà tí àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti CSR partners lè ìrànlọ́wọ́ tó bá a mu deployments nígbà tí àwọn àwùjọ nílò ìkọ̀kọ̀, curriculum alignment, tàbí funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Gbangba statement ti kí nìdí inspir exists àti kí ẹ̀kọ́ ìráyè wọlé means.

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ọ̀nà fún tó bá a mu AI ẹ̀kọ́ spaces àti funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Story láti àwọn quiz àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àwọn àwùjọ láti ọ̀fẹ́ àwọn irinṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ AI tí a kọ́ nínú gbangba.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Ìtàn-àròsọ spans àwọn quiz, offline ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ networks, curriculum gbígbé wọlé, àti gbangba àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Lágbára jù angle jẹ́ ọ̀fẹ́ gbangba AI ẹ̀kọ́ yẹn opens tààrà nínú ipo àlejò àti ń pa àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ active nípasẹ̀ mode-specific kíkọ́ni dípò gbogbogbò ìdáhùn iran.

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: Wider international buildout connected láti inspir iṣẹ́ àkànṣe.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and long-tail discovery.
entries.value: Written ẹ̀kọ́ ìkàwé yẹn supports àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́, àti long-tail discovery.

entries.source: This gives school leaders a low-friction way to evaluate the learning experience before committing to content work, staff workflows, or funded access.
entries.value: Yìí gives ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ leaders low-friction way láti evaluate ẹ̀kọ́ experience kí committing láti content iṣẹ́, staff àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, tàbí funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Trust and crawler policy
entries.value: Trust àti crawler ìlànà

entries.source: Trust and safety
entries.value: Trust àti safety

entries.source: Try platform
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò pẹpẹ

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò

entries.source: Try the platform, then talk to us about a school version.
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò pẹpẹ, lẹ́yìn náà talk láti wa nípa ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ẹ̀dà.

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: Understanding over àwọn ìdáhùn

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Unlike chat gbogbogbòbot, inspir ṣètò AI yí ká àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́ so àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú kind ti ìrànlọ́wọ́ wọ́n nílò: àwọn ìtọ́ni, àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn quiz, ìrántí aláṣmoṣẹ́, ere ipa, àríyànjiyàn, tàbí ìdáhùn.

entries.source: Use case
entries.value: Lo case

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: Lo https://inspirlearning.com fún ojúlé, /iṣẹ́ àfojúsùn fún iṣẹ́ àfojúsùn, /àwọn kókó fún gbangba ipo ẹ̀kọ́ àkójọ, àti /chat/learn-anything fún default guest ẹ̀kọ́ experience.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Lo yìí fún ilé-ẹ̀kọ́, alábàáṣiṣẹ́, CSR, àti education ìráyè wọlé references.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: Lo Yìí nígbà tí Citing long-form ìtọ́sọ́nà ìkàwé, ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìbéèrè, àti mode-specific àwọn àpilẹ̀kọ.

entries.source: Use this when describing the full set of guest-mode learning tools that are meant to be indexed.
entries.value: Lo Yìí nígbà tí Describing full set ti guest-mode ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn irinṣẹ́ yẹn jẹ́ túmọ̀ sí láti jẹ́ indexed.

entries.source: Use this when introducing inspir as the main product or linking from a directory, profile, or article.
entries.value: Lo yìí nígbà tí introducing inspir gẹ́gẹ́ bí main ọja tàbí linking láti àkójọ, profile, tàbí àpilẹ̀kọ.

entries.source: Use this when linking readers straight into the live learning experience.
entries.value: Lo yìí nígbà tí linking readers straight sí taara ẹ̀kọ́ experience.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, crawler policy, and school trust.
entries.value: Lo yìí nígbà tí referencing gbangba/ìkọ̀kọ̀ àwọn ààlà, crawler ìlànà, àti ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ trust.

entries.source: white label AI learning platform
entries.value: white label AI ẹ̀kọ́ pẹpẹ

entries.source: White-labelled AI chat
entries.value: Chat AI ti a fi aami tirẹ ṣe

entries.source: White-labelled AI learning experiences for schools, with custom workflows, confidentiality, NCERT-aligned options, and CSR sponsorship paths.
entries.value: White-labelled AI ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìrírí fún àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́, pẹ̀lú custom àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀, NCERT-aligned options, àti ìgbọ́wọ́ CSR àwọn ọ̀nà.

entries.source: White-labelled AI tutoring for schools, with guest learning modes, custom workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and CSR sponsorship paths.
entries.value: White-labelled ìkọ́ni AI fún àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́, pẹ̀lú guest àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́, custom àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, NCERT-aligned options, àti ìgbọ́wọ́ CSR àwọn ọ̀nà.

entries.source: White-labelled AI tutoring for schools, with guest learning modes, custom workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access paths.
entries.value: White-labelled ìkọ́ni AI fún àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́, pẹ̀lú guest àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́, custom àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, NCERT-aligned options, àti funded ìráyè wọlé àwọn ọ̀nà.

entries.source: Who can use the media page?
entries.value: Ta lè lo media ojú-ìwé?

entries.source: Who it helps
entries.value: Ta ni ó ràn lọ́wọ́

entries.source: Why does inspir allow AI discovery crawlers?
entries.value: Kí nìdí tí Ṣe inspir jẹ́ kí AI discovery crawlers?

entries.source: Why does inspir support school and partner deployments?
entries.value: Kí nìdí tí Ṣe inspir ìtìlẹ́yìn school àti alábàáṣiṣẹ́ deployments?

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: Kí nìdí tí Jẹ́ inspir tí a kọ́ yí ká àwọn ipo dípò ti one chat box?

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. school lè begin nípasẹ̀ testing gbangba àwọn ipo, lẹ́yìn náà lọ toward pilot tàbí tó bá a mu ìdásílẹ̀ nígbà tí lo ọ̀ràn, àkóónú nílò, àti funding ọ̀nà jẹ́ mọ́.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Yes. gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò such gẹ́gẹ́ bí kọ́ Anything, Socratic Instruction, olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ ilé, àwọn quiz, àti àwọn kaadi ìrántí ṣí directly láti canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. gbangba kókó àwọn ẹnu-ọ̀nà such gẹ́gẹ́ bí /chat/learn-anything àti /chat/socratic-instruction jẹ́ intended láti jẹ́ tó ṣeé fi sínú níọ́ka ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ojú-ìwé.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò let ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ leaders àti àwọn olùkọ́ gbìmọ̀ wò ẹ̀kọ́ experience kí discussing tó bá a mu ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀.
